data.name: Tab_BuiltIn
data.comment: DEPRECATED - Built-in is now a bundle

data.name: Help_Welcome_Description
data.value: Create the perfect ambient soundscape to help you relax, focus, or sleep. Mix multiple sounds, create playlists, and set timers for the ideal audio experience.

data.name: Help_GettingStarted_Description
data.value: Ambient Sleeper is organized into three main tabs:

data.name: Help_GettingStarted_Playback
data.value: Playback - Control your audio and create mixes

data.name: Help_Library_Bundles_Description
data.value: Collections of related ambient sounds (nature, white noise, etc.). Tap any sound to add it to your current mix or playlist.

data.name: Help_Library_Playlists_Description
data.value: View and manage your saved playlists. Load a playlist to queue multiple sounds for sequential playback. (Standard+ feature)

data.name: Help_Library_MixPlaylists_Description
data.value: Advanced feature for creating scheduled transitions between different mixes. (Premium+ feature)

data.name: Help_Playback_Mix_Description
data.value: Overlay multiple sounds simultaneously. Adjust individual volume levels for each sound. Save your favorite combinations.

data.name: Help_Playback_Mix_Tiers
data.value: Free: 2 sounds | Standard: 3 sounds | Premium: 10 sounds | Pro+: 20 sounds

data.name: Help_Playback_Playlist_Description
data.value: Play sounds sequentially with loop mode. (Standard+ feature)

data.name: Help_Playback_MixPlaylist_Description
data.value: Create scheduled rotations of different mixes with customizable durations and transitions. (Premium+ feature)

data.name: Help_Timer_Duration_Description
data.value: Set a countdown timer (e.g., 30 minutes). Audio will fade out when the timer expires.

data.name: Help_Timer_StopAt_Description
data.value: Set a specific time for audio to stop (e.g., 11:00 PM). Perfect for bedtime routines.

data.name: Help_Timer_Alarm_Description
data.value: Optionally play a system alarm sound when the timer expires. (Standard+ feature)

data.name: Help_Mixes_Description
data.value: Mixes allow you to overlay multiple ambient sounds simultaneously. From the Library tab, tap sounds to add them to your mix. In the Playback tab, adjust each sound's volume independently using the sliders.

data.name: Help_Mixes_Tip
data.value: Tip: Start with 1-2 sounds and gradually add more. Try keeping one sound louder as a 'base' and others softer for texture.

data.name: Help_EQ_Description
data.value: Customize the frequency balance of your audio. Premium tier includes a standard 3-band EQ, while Pro+ tier provides advanced multi-band control with presets and custom curves.

data.name: Help_Export_Description
data.value: Back up your mixes and playlists or share them with others. Standard+ tiers can export for personal backup. Premium+ tiers can create shareable exports that work across devices.

data.name: Help_Tier_Free_Features
data.value: Mix up to 2 sounds simultaneously | Access to all sound bundles | Save up to 3 mixes | 15-minute session limit

data.name: Help_Tier_Standard_Features
data.value: Mix up to 3 sounds simultaneously | Unlimited session length | Save up to 10 mixes | Playlist mode with looping | Custom alarm integration | Export/import (personal backup)

data.name: Help_Tier_Premium_Features
data.value: Mix up to 10 sounds simultaneously | Save unlimited mixes & playlists | Custom 3-band equalizer | Mix Playlist mode | Export/import with sharing

data.name: Help_Tier_ProPlus_Features
data.value: Mix up to 20 sounds simultaneously | Unlimited saved content | Advanced multi-band equalizer with presets | Mix Playlist with custom transitions | Priority support | Early access to new features

data.name: Help_Tips_Simple
data.value: Start Simple: Begin with 1-2 sounds and gradually add more

data.name: Help_Tips_Volume
data.value: Volume Balance: Adjust individual volumes to create depth

data.name: Help_Tips_Timer
data.value: Timer Strategy: Use Duration mode for naps, Stop At Time for bedtime

data.name: Help_Tips_Save
data.value: Save Configurations: Save mixes for different activities

data.name: Help_Tips_Background
data.value: Background Play: Audio continues when app is minimized

data.name: Help_Troubleshooting_Audio
data.value: Audio Not Playing: Check device volume and app permissions

data.name: Help_Troubleshooting_Timer
data.value: Timer Not Working: Verify timer is enabled and duration is set

data.name: Help_Troubleshooting_Data
data.value: Saved Data Lost: Use Export feature regularly to back up

data.name: Help_Troubleshooting_Performance
data.value: Performance Issues: Try reducing number of simultaneous sounds

data.name: Help_Troubleshooting_More
data.value: Need More Help? Visit Settings > Diagnostics to check system health and view error reports.

data.name: Legal_Critical_Statement
data.value: THIS APPLICATION IS FOR ENTERTAINMENT AND RELAXATION PURPOSES ONLY.

data.name: Legal_Critical_NotMedical
data.value: Ambient Sleeper is NOT a medical device, medical treatment, or healthcare application. It is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease, medical condition, or sleep disorder.

data.name: Legal_Entertainment_ForText
data.value: Ambient Sleeper is designed solely for:

data.name: Legal_Entertainment_List
data.value: Entertainment | Relaxation | Creating ambient soundscapes | Personal enjoyment

data.name: Legal_Entertainment_DoesNotList
data.value: Provide medical advice or treatment | Replace professional medical care | Diagnose or treat sleep disorders | Cure insomnia or other medical conditions | Replace prescribed medications or therapies

data.name: Legal_NoAdvice_Description
data.value: The content, features, and functionality of Ambient Sleeper do not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified healthcare provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

data.name: Legal_NoAdvice_SleepProblems
data.value: If you have sleep problems: Consult with a licensed healthcare professional, such as a sleep specialist or physician.

data.name: Legal_Health_Consult
data.value: If you suffer from any of the following conditions, consult your doctor before using this app:

data.name: Legal_Health_ConditionsList
data.value: Insomnia or other sleep disorders | Anxiety or depression | Epilepsy or seizure disorders | Hearing impairments or sensitivity | Any chronic medical condition

data.name: Legal_Health_NoDelay
data.value: Never delay seeking medical advice or disregard professional medical advice because of something you have heard or experienced in this app.

data.name: Legal_Liability_Risk_List
data.value: You use Ambient Sleeper entirely at your own risk | The app is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind | We make no guarantees about the effectiveness of the app for any purpose | We do not guarantee that the app will help you sleep, relax, or achieve any specific outcome

data.name: Legal_Liability_NoLiability_Text
data.value: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the developers, publishers, and distributors of Ambient Sleeper shall not be liable for:

data.name: Legal_Liability_NoLiability_List
data.value: Any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages | Any health issues, sleep problems, or medical conditions that arise from or are related to app use | Any loss of sleep, productivity, or quality of life | Any hearing damage from improper volume settings | Any personal injury or property damage | Any damages arising from reliance on the app as a medical treatment or solution

data.name: Legal_Liability_Indemnification_Text
data.value: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the developers, publishers, distributors, and any affiliated parties from and against any and all claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs, debts, and expenses (including attorney's fees) arising from:

data.name: Legal_Liability_Indemnification_List
data.value: Your use or misuse of the app | Your violation of any terms or conditions | Your violation of any third-party rights | Any health issues related to app usage | Any claim that you relied on the app as medical treatment

data.name: Legal_Volume_Warning
data.value: ⚠️ WARNING: Prolonged exposure to loud sounds can cause hearing damage.

data.name: Legal_Volume_Text
data.value: Always use reasonable volume levels. Do not use this app at high volumes, especially while sleeping or using headphones.

data.name: Legal_Volume_Guidelines
data.value: Start with low volume and adjust gradually | Never exceed comfortable listening levels | Take breaks from audio playback | If you experience ringing in ears or hearing discomfort, stop use immediately and consult a doctor

data.name: Legal_Emergency_Text
data.value: This app is not intended for use in emergency situations. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call emergency services immediately (911 in the US, 112 in Europe, or your local emergency number).

data.name: Legal_Timer_Text
data.value: The timer and alarm features are provided for convenience only:

data.name: Legal_Timer_List
data.value: Do not rely on this app as your primary alarm clock for critical appointments | We are not liable if the timer or alarm fails to function | Battery drain, system issues, or other factors may prevent timers from working correctly | Always use a dedicated alarm clock for important wake-up times

data.name: Legal_Children_Text
data.value: This app is not specifically designed for use by children. Parents and guardians should:

data.name: Legal_Children_List
data.value: Supervise children's use of the app | Ensure volume levels are safe for children's sensitive hearing | Consult a pediatrician before using the app as a sleep aid for children | Be aware that children may require different approaches to sleep and relaxation

data.name: Legal_Data_Text
data.value: While we strive to protect your data, we make no guarantees about:

data.name: Legal_Data_List
data.value: The security of your saved mixes, playlists, or settings | The persistence of your data across app updates or device changes | The backup or recovery of your data

data.name: Legal_Data_Export
data.value: We recommend exporting your mixes and playlists regularly if they are important to you.

data.name: Legal_ThirdParty_Text
data.value: If you import your own audio files or use third-party sounds:

data.name: Legal_ThirdParty_List
data.value: You are responsible for ensuring you have the legal right to use that content | We are not liable for any copyright or intellectual property violations | We do not screen or approve user-imported content

data.name: Legal_Changes_List
data.value: Modify, suspend, or discontinue any feature at any time | Change subscription tiers and pricing | Update these terms and disclaimers | Remove sounds or features from the app

data.name: Legal_Changes_NoLiability
data.value: We are not liable for any losses or damages resulting from such changes.

data.name: Legal_Law_Text
data.value: These terms and disclaimers are governed by applicable laws in your jurisdiction. By using this app, you agree that any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local laws.

data.name: Legal_Contact_Text
data.value: If you have questions about these terms or disclaimers, please contact us through the app support channels.

data.name: Legal_Acceptance_Agree
data.value: By using Ambient Sleeper, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to all terms, conditions, disclaimers, and limitations of liability stated in this document.

data.name: Legal_Acceptance_Disagree
data.value: If you do not agree to these terms, you must immediately stop using the app and uninstall it from your device.

data.name: Legal_Footer_Disclaimer
data.value: This disclaimer is provided for informational purposes. It does not constitute legal advice. Consult with a qualified attorney for legal matters.

data.name: EQ_5BandDescription
data.value: Adjust 5 frequency bands to customize your sound. Move sliders up to boost, down to reduce.

data.name: EQ_Tip1
data.value: • Q Factor: Lower = wider frequency range affected

data.name: PlaybackSettings_Tip4
data.value: • Upgrade your tier for longer fade-out durations

data.name: Ad_WatchForExtension_Message
data.value: Watch a short ad to extend your session

data.name: Timer_Description
data.value: Automatically stop playback after a set duration or at a specific time.

data.name: Timer_AlarmDescription
data.value: Sound an alarm after the timer completes (Standard+ feature)

data.name: Timer_LockedMessage
data.value: 🔒 Advanced timer features require Standard tier or above.

data.name: Timer_Tip4
data.value: • Use +/- 5 min buttons to quickly adjust running timer

data.name: EQ_Tip_Treble
data.value: • Treble (4k-16k Hz): Enhance for brightness and detail
